alertBox.title: Alert box
alertBox.description: Wrap a short message in a decorative ASCII box.

drift.title: Minor alignment drift
drift.description: The in-game font (AXIS_12) only offers widths that are multiples of 3 for spaces and 12 for frame characters. When your content width isn't a multiple of 3, up to ~⅓ of a space of misalignment is mathematically unavoidable without inserting visible filler characters. The box stays as straight as possible.
